response: Define the study objectives to ensure data collection aligns with data analysis goals. Collect data from participants to support data interpretation in the field. Monitor data quality to maintain data consistency throughout the study. Record data accurately to ensure data integrity remains intact. Analyze data patterns to derive data insights relevant to the research question. Validate data sources to confirm data reliability for accurate conclusions. Interpret data findings to generate data-driven recommendations. Share data results to promote data transparency among stakeholders.
